reference: I started with tuberculosis medication by mistake, and it was later determined that I had germinoma, which was cured by chemotherapy and radiation. However, since that point, I have been suffering from side effects like hand shivering, loss of grip, and facing difficulty while walking. Recently, I also experienced seizures.
text: I started with tuberculosis medication by mistake, and it was later determined that I had germinoma, which was cured by chemotherapy and radiation.
